title: Remove Monday logo from Embed Code and Shareable Link
excerpt: Embed Code and Shareable Link are mainly used by users with their own website as tool or brand, the Hide Monday.com ability already provided for Forms, please let us hide the Monday.com logo from Embed Code and Shareable…

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml: Embed Code and Shareable Link are mainly used by users with their own website as tool or brand, the Hide Monday.com ability already provided for Forms, please let us hide the Monday.com logo from Embed Code and Shareable Link too.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Kmk!

Thank you for that feedback!

I will make sure to pass this request to our team so they can review it

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: TomZorc (Tom Zorc)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be great to have this enabled…
